nasb.text: Heshbon, and all its cities which are on the plain: Dibon and Bamoth-baal and Beth-baal-meon,

esv.text: with Heshbon, and all its cities that are in the tableland; Dibon, and Bamoth-baal, and Beth-baal-meon,

cnv.text: 希實本和平原上屬希實本所有的城、底本、巴末．巴力、伯．巴力．勉、

ccb.text: 到希实本城和希实本平原的所有城邑，即底本、巴末·巴力、伯·巴力·勉、
